messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0152",
  "title": "Kingshot",
  "page_index": 92,
  "page_range": "92-93"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0153",
    "title": "Kingshot 2025优质在投创意",
    "page_range": "93-94",
    "summary": "This section presents a curated collection of high-performing active advertising creatives for Kingshot in 2025. It supports retrieval for: **Topics/Entities** (Kingshot 2025 ad campaigns and creative assets); **Dates** (February 2025 through December 2025); **Metrics & Selection Criteria** (creatives filtered by high new-launch impressions or elevated popularity/heat scores); **Data Source** (GuangdaDa/广大大 Advertiser Analysis Module); **Procedures/Format** (interactive media layout where clicking thumbnail images plays the full creative); and **Evidence Types** (platform-verified, performance-ranked ad examples used for creative benchmarking and campaign trend analysis)."
  }
]

message.content: This section covers Kingshot’s 2025 advertising campaigns and creative assets, spanning February 2025 through December 2025. It details metrics and selection criteria, specifically filtering creatives by high new-launch impressions and elevated popularity/heat scores. The procedure utilizes an interactive media layout where clicking thumbnail images plays the full creative. Sourced from the GuangdaDa (广大大) Advertiser Analysis Module, the section provides platform-verified, performance-ranked ad examples as evidence for creative benchmarking and campaign trend analysis.
